DeFi security is broken.

Manual audits take weeks. Compilers miss logic flaws. Attackers automate.
AetherGuard flips the asymmetry by bringing AI into your CI/CD.

Core capabilities

Three pillars of intelligent security.

⚡

Neural Scan Engine

CodeBERT-powered analysis that understands intent, not just patterns. Detects zero-day vulnerability classes before they become exploits.

< 0.8savg scan time
🛡️

Autonomous Remediation

AI generates secure patches that preserve your contract's logic while eliminating attack vectors. Production-ready fixes, not suggestions.

97.2%fix accuracy
🔮

Real-time Sentinel

Continuous monitoring feeds that track emerging threat patterns across deployed contracts. Get alerts before exploits reach mainnet.

24/7monitoring

How it works

Three steps to bulletproof security.

01
📋

Paste your contract

Drop Solidity code or connect your GitHub repo. AetherGuard indexes the full dependency tree.

02
🧠

AI analyzes in real-time

CodeBERT neural engine scans for 200+ vulnerability patterns, logic flaws, and attack vectors.

03
🎯

Get actionable results

Severity-scored findings with AI-generated fix suggestions, ready for your PR or audit report.

Live Analysis

Watch AI dissect a vulnerable contract in real time.

AgentVault.sol
Scanning...
1contract AgentVault {
2 mapping(address => uint256) credit;
3 function deposit() external payable {
4 credit[msg.sender] += msg.value;
5 }
6 function withdraw(uint256 amount) external {
7 require(credit[msg.sender] >= amount, 'insufficient');
8 (bool ok,) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}("");Reentrancy risk
9 require(ok, 'transfer failed');
10 credit[msg.sender] -= amount;State after call
11 }
12}

Scan output

AI Diagnosis

Checks-effects-interactions violated

State is updated after a value transfer. That creates room for reentrant execution and inconsistent contract accounting. An attacker can drain the vault by recursively calling withdraw() before the balance updates.

Recommended fix

- credit[msg.sender] -= amount; // line 10
+ credit[msg.sender] -= amount; // move before call
+ (bool ok,) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}("");

Threat level

SCANNING
24/ 100

Reentrancy

42

Access Ctrl

28

Logic

16

execution-trace.log

Runtime timeline

Parse00:00.12

AST + CFG ready

Detect00:00.72

External call before state mutation

Patch00:01.02

Safe ordering generated

Attack path snapshot

1

User requests withdraw(amount)

2

Contract performs external value transfer

3

Attacker re-enters before balance update

4

Vault accounting desyncs from true reserves

Root cause

The value transfer executes before the internal balance mutation, leaving the contract re-enterable during the most sensitive phase.

Scroll storytelling

A security operating system that adapts to how you build.

Three phases. One continuous flow. From observation to intervention to daily operations — AetherGuard stays with your team at every stage.

02

signal streams

Live analysis, alerts, and copilot memory stay in sync.

24/7

coverage

Every contract state change is treated like a live operating surface.

< 1s

response window

Detection and remediation guidance arrive before release.

Observe
Intervene
Operate
◉

01 — Observe

Map live AI exposure before it reaches production.

AetherGuard gives platform teams one place to scan contracts, spot risky execution paths, and understand where AI-assisted code needs human review.

◈

02 — Intervene

Catch dangerous flows while they are still editable.

Typing, detection, scoring, and remediation guidance converge into a premium command surface instead of disconnected audit steps.

⬡

03 — Operate

Turn security into an always-on operating rhythm.

Workspace notifications, reports, and AI copilots keep signal moving across product, engineering, and security leaders.
